intro: Deep in the temple, a stone font brims with water so clear it seems to glow. The air here feels strangely light.
title: The Cleansing Font
description: An ancient font of clean water sits untouched in the temple. Drink from it: if a curse weighs on your team it will be lifted, and otherwise the pure water restores your whole party.
query: Will you drink from the font?

1.label: Drink from the font
1.tooltip: (+) Lifts a curse, or fully restores the party if uncursed
1.selected: You cup the clear water and let your team drink their fill.

2.label: Leave it untouched
2.selected: You leave the font undisturbed and move deeper into the temple.

cleansed: The water washes a lingering curse clean away.
restored: The pure water soothes every ache and weariness. Your party is fully restored.
